transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sunrise Recovery Center, this is Roger.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi, yeah, I'm calling because... I think I have a problem with drinking. My name is Tiffany.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay. How long has this been going on?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Probably four or five years. But it's gotten worse in the last year.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: How much are you drinking a day?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Maybe a bottle of wine at night, sometimes more.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: And are you drinking in the morning?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Not usually. Occasionally on weekends.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay. Based on what you're telling me, it sounds like you have a dependency problem that's going to need professional treatment.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Yeah, I figured as much.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Do you have insurance?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Yes. Summit Select.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Member ID?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Group number?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay. We'll verify that. Any prior treatment?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: No.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay. Someone will call you back about availability.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Do you know when?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Probably today or tomorrow.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Okay. Should I do anything in the meantime?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Just wait for our call. We'll figure out the details then.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Alright. Thank you.

gold_labels.coaching_notes: COMPLIANCE VIOLATION: 'it sounds like you have a dependency problem' is a diagnostic claim. Agent stayed in intake role on language but crossed the line with this statement. Beyond compliance: flat tone throughout, no empathy opening, clinical screen incomplete (missed severity, withdrawal, prior treatment), next step is vague ('today or tomorrow'). Major coaching opportunity.
